---
about:
  template: jolla
  id: about-block
  image: "img/my_image.jpg"
  links:
    #- icon: twitter
    #  text: Twitter
    #  href: https://twitter.com/MarvinSchmittML
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/unpilbaek
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/unpilbaek
    #- icon: envelope
    #  text: Email
    #  href: "mailto:mail.marvinschmitt@gmail.com"  
---

::: {#about-block}
:::

# Welcome to my website!

Oi, mundo!
<!--Please feel free to [contact me](mailto:mail.marvinschmitt@gmail.com) if you have any questions or would like to discuss potential projects.-->

<!--
```{=html}
<div  style="margin: 30px; text-align: center;">
<a class="btn btn-primary" href="https://www.marvinschmitt.com/blog/website-tutorial-quarto/" role="button" target="_blank" style="padding: 15px 30px;">View the tutorial for this template (+ download link)</a>
</div>
```
-->
